candidates.why: Directly labeled COGS/cost of sales and matches the total cost of revenues in populated years.

candidates.row_label: GROSS PROFIT Sales Expenses Administration expenses Research and development expenses

Potential overhead bucket for older years when detailed SG&A rows are absent.
Clear overhead component of SG&A.
Dedicated R&D line; per rule, include in XSGA if separately reported and not clearly embedded in selected SG&A components so it can be subtracted via XRD.
General overhead bucket; may help cover years without full SG&A detail, but broader/less precise than admin or sales expenses.

candidates.row_label: Restructuring costs related to personnel changes
candidates.why: Non-recurring item, not standard SG&A component.
Equity reserve, not SG&A.
Headcount metric, not expense.

variables.notes: R:nc. Candidate list appears incomplete because a clear SG&A component row 'Sales expenses' exists in the preview but is not in candidates. Per rules, selected it from full preview and set manual review. Included Administration expenses and Sales expenses as core SG&A components. Included Research and development expenses as separately reported overhead so XSGA-XRD can exclude it. Added Other external expenses and Other Operating Expenses to cover earlier years where detailed SG&A breakdown is absent. Avoided totals/balancing rows and D&A/impairments. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Sales expenses
